summary: Tested Quotes and Partner Agreements management screens. All backend APIs working (14/14 tests passed). Frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation, buttons, and web-compatible alerts.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attributes not rendering in React Native Web DOM for back/edit buttons

critical_code_review_comments: Quote detail page correctly shows Resend button only for non-accepted/non-archived quotes
Quote detail page correctly shows Delete button only for draft quotes
Partner Agreement detail page has all required buttons: Back, Edit, Copy Link, Send, Delete
Web-compatible alert functions (showAlert, showSimpleAlert, showConfirm) properly implemented in services/alert.ts
Backend PATCH /api/subscriptions/quotes/{id} endpoint working for updating quotes
Backend POST /api/subscriptions/quotes/{id}/send endpoint working for sending quotes
Backend DELETE /api/partners/agreements/{id} endpoint working for deleting non-signed agreements
Backend POST /api/partners/agreements/{id}/send endpoint working for sending agreements

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All pages load, buttons visible, navigation works)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test quotes and agreements during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quotes and Partner Agreements management fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/subscriptions/quotes, GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/subscriptions/quotes/{id}, POST /api/subscriptions/quotes/{id}/send. Partner Agreements: GET/POST /api/partners/agreements, GET/PUT/DELETE /api/partners/agreements/{id}, POST /api/partners/agreements/{id}/send. Frontend pages at /admin/quotes, /admin/quote/[id], /admin/partner-agreements, /admin/partner-agreement/[id]. Note: data-testid props on TouchableOpacity don't render in React Native Web DOM but functionality works.

features_verified.quotes_list_page: PASS - Lists quotes with filter pills, shows quote cards
features_verified.quotes_detail_page: PASS - Shows quote info, back button, edit button, resend button
features_verified.quotes_detail_delete_button: PASS - Only shows for draft quotes (correct behavior)
features_verified.agreements_list_page: PASS - Lists agreements with stats, shows agreement cards
features_verified.agreements_detail_page: PASS - Shows back, edit, copy link, send, delete buttons
features_verified.web_compatible_alerts: PASS - Using window.confirm/window.alert for web compatibility

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - Feature implementation testing, all features working correctly
